testcase.name: testGetAllPosts
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: testGetSinglePost
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 18:18:27 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true Cache-Control: max-age=43200 etag: W/"124-yiKdLzqO5gfBrJFrcdJ8Yq0LGnU" expires: -1 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fYWdnEf0DmCzgr0VsN5e6AtGFTukaisQ17mn0sPpnh8%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1769696362"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fYWdnEf0DmCzgr0VsN5e6AtGFTukaisQ17mn0sPpnh8%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1769696362" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 999 x-ratelimit-reset: 1769696416 Age: 8242 cf-cache-status: HIT Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e17adb2cff735a4-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "userId": 1, "id": 1, "title": "sunt aut facere repellat provident occaecati excepturi optio reprehenderit", "body": "quia et suscipit
suscipit recusandae consequuntur expedita et cum
reprehenderit molestiae ut ut quas totam
nostrum rerum est autem sunt rem eveniet architecto" }

testcase.name: testCreatePost
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "title": "Lab 10 - Tịnh", "body": "Nội dung bài viết", "userId": 1 } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 18:18:28 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 96 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"60-W9rS8XN8XE7aBcwx9haMAAPAdUk" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=bPEjt9oegxr57dydtxxa%2FNSxjieqf0prCWCfU85VAdE%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1774376308"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=bPEjt9oegxr57dydtxxa%2FNSxjieqf0prCWCfU85VAdE%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1774376308" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 999 x-ratelimit-reset: 1774376358 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9e17adb5ff30633f-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "title": "Lab 10 - Tịnh", "body": "Nội dung bài viết", "userId": 1, "id": 101 }

testcase.name: testUpdatePost
testcase.system-out:
Request method: PUT Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "title": "Updated Title" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 18:18:29 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 41 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"29-EWwkJlYjiGLzgrQZC71rYSw9seA" expires: -1 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=eTzIjZkv91UV%2BeUaF5D0qxoVHaS1TQEDFomoXbZlyF4%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1774376309"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=eTzIjZkv91UV%2BeUaF5D0qxoVHaS1TQEDFomoXbZlyF4%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1774376309" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 998 x-ratelimit-reset: 1774376358 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9e17adb88a47fdbb-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400

testcase.name: testDeletePost
testGetCommentsByPost
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1/comments Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 18:18:29 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 657 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true Cache-Control: max-age=43200 Content-Encoding: gzip etag: W/"5e6-4bSPS5tq8F8ZDeFJULWh6upjp7U" expires: -1 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=nZotOLt3fXnyj23mW0qILL8I7dnNmi7s2Uv7lljUfwY%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1774366141"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=nZotOLt3fXnyj23mW0qILL8I7dnNmi7s2Uv7lljUfwY%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1774366141" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 999 x-ratelimit-reset: 1774366158 Age: 10168 Accept-Ranges: bytes cf-cache-status: HIT CF-RAY: 9e17adc09bdbfd31-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
[ { "postId": 1, "id": 1, "name": "id labore ex et quam laborum", "email": "Eliseo@gardner.biz", "body": "laudantium enim quasi est quidem magnam voluptate ipsam eos
tempora quo necessitatibus
dolor quam autem quasi
reiciendis et nam sapiente accusantium" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 2, "name": "quo vero reiciendis velit similique earum", "email": "Jayne_Kuhic@sydney.com", "body": "est natus enim nihil est dolore omnis voluptatem numquam
et omnis occaecati quod ullam at
voluptatem error expedita pariatur
nihil sint nostrum voluptatem reiciendis et" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 3, "name": "odio adipisci rerum aut animi", "email": "Nikita@garfield.biz", "body": "quia molestiae reprehenderit quasi aspernatur
aut expedita occaecati aliquam eveniet laudantium
omnis quibusdam delectus saepe quia accusamus maiores nam est
cum et ducimus et vero voluptates excepturi deleniti ratione" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 4, "name": "alias odio sit", "email": "Lew@alysha.tv", "body": "non et atque
occaecati deserunt quas accusantium unde odit nobis qui voluptatem
quia voluptas consequuntur itaque dolor
et qui rerum deleniti ut occaecati" }, { "postId": 1, "id": 5, "name": "vero eaque aliquid doloribus et culpa", "email": "Hayden@althea.biz", "body": "harum non quasi et ratione
tempore iure ex voluptates in ratione
harum architecto fugit inventore cupiditate
voluptates magni quo et" } ]

testcase.name: testGetListUsers
testUserAddressSchema
testcase.system-out:

{ "id": 1, "name": "Leanne Graham", "username": "Bret", "email": "Sincere@april.biz", "address": { "street": "Kulas Light", "suite": "Apt. 556", "city": "Gwenborough", "zipcode": "92998-3874", "geo": { "lat": "-37.3159", "lng": "81.1496" } }, "phone": "1-770-736-8031 x56442", "website": "hildegard.org", "company": { "name": "Romaguera-Crona", "catchPhrase": "Multi-layered client-server neural-net", "bs": "harness real-time e-markets" } }

testcase.name: testUiLoginAfterApiPass
testcase.system-out: >>> API bị chặn (403). Sử dụng Token dự phòng để thực hiện Test UI. >>> Đang thực hiện luồng UI trên Saucedemo...
testcase.system-err: Mar 25, 2026 1:18:39 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 25, 2026 1:18:39 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.154. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.16.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testFullIntegrationFlow
testcase.system-out: >>> API bị chặn (403). Sử dụng Token dự phòng để thực hiện Test UI. >>> Đang thêm sản phẩm vào giỏ hàng... >>> Hoàn thành luồng tích hợp API + UI thành công!
